languageDesc: Choose the display language for the app
minimizeToTrayDesc: Keep running in system tray when closed
showNotificationsDesc: Display a notification when operations complete
threatDetectionAlertsDesc: Show a system notification when suspicious network activity is detected
autoRestartDesc: Restart automatically when an update is downloaded
updateCheckIntervalDesc: How often to check for updates in the background
windowsPackageManagerDesc: Choose which package manager to use for software updates
cloudUnlinkedCardDesc: Unlock threat monitoring, AI safety scores, vulnerability scanning, and more
cloudLinkedCardDesc: Manage your cloud connection and device settings
backupFolderDesc: Where LightClean writes registry and shell-extension backups before making changes. Existing backups stay in their previous location when you switch folders.
backupFolderUpdatedDesc: Existing backups remain in their previous location.
backupModeDesc: Targeted only saves the keys being changed (small). Full hive snapshots entire branches before each run (hundreds of MB).
protectRecycleBinDesc: Skip the Recycle Bin during cleaning so accidentally deleted files can still be recovered
secureDeleteDesc: Overwrite files before deletion for sensitive data (slower)
closeBrowsersDesc: Automatically close browsers to unlock cache files
createRestorePointDesc: Create a system restore point before cleaning (requires admin)
skipRecentFilesDesc: Don't delete files modified within this time
startupSettingFailedDesc: Task Scheduler may be restricted by group policy or security software.
rulePackSignatureValid: Rule files and digital signature verified
rulePackInvalid: Rule pack verification failed; bundled rules are active
rulePackRestartRequired: Restart LightClean to activate this rule version.
rulePackRolledBack: Rolled back to the previous rule version
